# isQueryResponse

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether this object is an instance of the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.QueryResponse] class.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute Boolean isQueryResponse;
```

## Discussion

This property is always `true`.
